channel.title: Bbc News on Aman Ahuja
channel.description: Recent content in Bbc News on Aman Ahuja

item.title: Aseem Trivedi
item.description:
Originally published on my old blog, Pafnuty blog. Reposted here as an effort to consolidate writing into one place. The original publication date was: September 10, 2012.

From the BBC news today (abbreviated):

Mr Trivedi was arrested on Saturday for a series of cartoons lampooning politicians. In one of his cartoons the customary three lions in India’s national emblem are replaced with three wolves, their teeth dripping blood, with the message “Long live corruption” written underneath. Another cartoon depicts the Indian parliament as a giant toilet bowl.
